taxonomy: Ericoila pumila is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. This family is commonly known as the bellflower family, which comprises a diverse range of flowering plants. The Campanulaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Ericoila pumila being a part of one of these subgroups. The exact classification of Ericoila pumila within the Campanulaceae family is not well-documented, but it is generally classified as a low-growing, herbaceous perennial plant. Further research is needed to determine its specific classification and taxonomic relationships.
